summary: Phase 3 frontend testing complete. Verified mobile responsive (hamburger Sheet drawer at <1024px), no horizontal overflow at 414px on Dashboard/Entries/Parties/Reports/Backup, desktop sidebar visible at 1440px, mobile menu button hidden on desktop. WhatsApp button on PartyLedger renders with green tint, opens https://wa.me/<phone>?text=<encoded message> in new tab with all required content (shop name, Net Balance, Jama, Naame, Generated date). Phone auto-prepending with '91' works for 10-digit numbers (verified party with phone 1234567890 -> wa.me/911234567890).

issues: Console error: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' Also missing aria-describedby. Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle + SheetDescription inside SheetContent in Layout.jsx for a11y compliance (functional impact: none, but flagged by Radix).
Same pre-existing DialogContent a11y warning carried over from iteration 2.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add VisuallyHidden SheetTitle/SheetDescription inside the mobile Sheet in Layout.jsx to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx mobile Sheet works correctly; nav items call onNavigate -> setOpen(false), sheet auto-closes on nav click and navigates properly.

PartyLedger.jsx shareWhatsApp(): sanitizePhone correctly strips non-digits and prepends '91' to exactly 10-digit numbers. Falls back to wa.me/?text=... when no phone. window.open uses 'noopener,noreferrer' (good security).

Mobile breakpoint correctly uses Tailwind 'lg' (1024px). Below it, sidebar is hidden via 'hidden lg:flex' and mobile top bar appears via 'lg:hidden'. main element has pt-14 on mobile to clear the fixed top bar.

No horizontal overflow detected at 414px on any tested page (Dashboard, Entries, Parties, Reports, Backup). Tables inside ledger have overflow-x-auto container — scroll horizontally without breaking layout.
WhatsApp button styling: green tint via text-[#128c7e] hover:bg-[#e7f6f3] border-[#128c7e]/30 — matches WhatsApp brand color guidance.
PartyLedger.jsx is ~200 lines, well within size limits.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing seeded party 'Abc' (phone 1234567890) for WhatsApp link verification — 'Sunder Bullion' was not found in current DB but functionality fully validated with another party.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 mobile + WhatsApp share verified working. Mobile menu testid: [data-testid='mobile-menu-button']. WhatsApp testid: [data-testid='ledger-whatsapp-button']. To intercept window.open in playwright, override page.evaluate(() => window.open = (url) => window.__opened.push(url)) before clicking. The wa.me link uses URL-encoded text with format: lines joined by \n, includes *bold* markers via asterisks (WhatsApp formatting). Sheet has Radix a11y warning about missing DialogTitle - not blocking but should be fixed.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All Phase 3 acceptance criteria met: (a) mobile hamburger Sheet works with all nav items + logout, (b) sidebar hidden on mobile / visible on desktop, (c) no overflow at 414px, (d) Touch% column on Entries, (e) WhatsApp button green-tinted with correct testid, (f) phone auto-prepends 91 for 10-digit, (g) message body contains shop name, period, Jama/Naame totals, Net Balance, generated date.
